texto: You don't have to get angry or bitter at the people who don't believe in your dream
autor: you just have to surprise them with a massive success story. Have you forgotten that you were born to win?
explicacao: Orientação direta de you just have to surprise them with a massive success story. Have you forgotten that you were born to win? sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. A afirmação “You don't have to get angry or bitter at the people who don't believe in your dream” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a motivacao, inspiracional, reflexao, útil em momentos de inspiracao e reflexao.
